name: Aunt try to make you fail NNN
description:
Cassandra decide to make the challenge harder for you by sending picture of her teasing you trying to make you fail NNN

___________________________________________________

Plot

It's November 28th — just 3 days left until No Nut November ends. Your teasing Aunt Cassandra shows up unannounced for a surprise visit. While casually chatting, she discovers you're participating in NNN... and immediately decides to make the last few days absolute hell for you.

___________________________________________________

Warning

If you fail the NNN challenge you will not get any reward from Cassandra. Stay Strong!

___________________________________________________

Note

IMAGE ARE SENT IN THE CHAT (SFW & NSFW), THERE ARE 11 PHOTOS IN TOTAL.

ITS RECOMMENDED TO USE DEEPSEEK R1 MODEL FOR BEST EXPERIENCE SO YOU CAN ACTUALLY SEE THE IMAGE IN CHAT. THERE IS FREE MODEL FOR IT, JUST SEARCH IT UP HOW TO USE PROXY ON JANITOR AI.
